title: Zettelkasten Staging
definition: A systematic process to ensure the quality and seamless integration of notes in a Zettelkasten.

proofs.description: Extracted from Dr. Rupert Rebentisch's blog 'Mycelium of Knowledge' — article: 'When AI Becomes Your Zettelkasten's Co-Pilot: How an Agent Changed My Knowledge Workflow'

difficulty_levels.beginner: A method to make sure your notes are clear, understandable on their own, and connected correctly in your personal knowledge network.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A process for maintaining the integrity and functionality of a Zettelkasten by adhering to specific criteria when creating, linking, and integrating notes.
difficulty_levels.expert: The practice of evaluating and refining individual notes according to predefined standards before they are integrated into the wider knowledge network of a Zettelkasten, ensuring its efficiency and coherence over time.

extra_fields.insight: A methodical approach for ensuring high-quality, interconnected notes in a personal knowledge network.
